review_text:
My husband and I have been patients at Arviv Aesthetics in Tampa now for almost 2 years,  and we still are extremely satisfied with the services.   We have come to meet a lot of the staff and the ladies are just fantastic, they are friendly, smart and gentle! 😀
Marla has been injected my HRT pellets and she has the touch!  She asks how I am feeling along with checking my blood levels for each injection.  Marla has an awesome personality and you really feel taken care of when you are done.  We ask alot of questions at our appointments and are always given the time and the answers we need.
We live almost an hour away, but it is worth the drive for the care that we receive.  Thank you to everyone at Arviv 🤩🩷

Below is my original review 2 years ago.
My husband and I are very pleased with your office.  Everyone is so friendly and knowledgeable.   Dr Arviv, you and your staff are awesome as you answered all of our questions and spent quality time with us without rushing us out.
That kind of service is very valuable and appreciated. Great place to go! We are looking forward to HRT and other services!

review_text:
This was my first facial, I was excited for it and had all of these expectations. Danielle went above and beyond and surpassed all my expectations. She is AMAZING! Very professional, super personable, very knowledgeable, she talked me through everything and made sure I was comfortable. It was very relaxing and I’m also a talker so I loved how she listened to me talk and made conversation with me. I would definitely go back and get my facial with Danielle.

I was also serviced by Emily for intimate lightening and Co2 laser. Okay, she definitely knows what she is doing. She listened to all of my concerns, was very accommodating, professional, explained to me the procedure and the aftercare instructions. She took her time and always asked me if I was doing okay and made sure I was as comfortable as can be for the procedure. If ever I have any questions, I love that I can call and Emily speaks to me and answers any questions I may have. This attention to detail is what keeps me coming back.

Thank you all for a pleasant experience!

review_text:
I had such an amazing experience at Arviv Medical Aesthetics Tampa from start to finish. The entire team was incredibly welcoming, professional, and genuinely attentive to my goals. You can tell they truly care about their clients and take the time to explain everything in a way that makes you feel comfortable and confident.
The space itself is clean, modern, and relaxing it immediately puts you at ease. My provider was extremely knowledgeable and precise, and I never felt rushed or pressured. They customized everything to what would look best for me, which I really appreciated.
Most importantly, the results are beautiful natural, refreshed, and exactly what I was hoping for. I left feeling more confident and already looking forward to my next visit.
If you’re considering any aesthetic treatments, I can’t recommend them enough. Truly top-tier service and results!
review_date_label: Mar 30, 2026 (verified from SerpAPI iso_date, last edited Mar 30, 2026)

review_text:
I got laser hair removal here about 3 years ago or so. It’s been the best decision I’ve ever made. I haven’t had to think about shaving or waxing in forever and I wish I could’ve told my 18 year old self about it. I feel like a beautiful hairless cat. No more razor bumps or ingrown hairs. Honestly the cost seems high but if you think of the time and money you’re saving from traditional razors and stuff, it’s so worth it.

I had Diana as my person. She walked me through everything, was super professional and made me feel very comfortable from start to finish. She’s really got a way of making you feel calm and the entire experience was phenomenal.

I bought a package years ago, so I’m not sure what prices are like now. I still would’ve paid a pretty penny to not feel razor burn or any sort of pain from waxing. If you’re someone with dark hair and thus, dark armpits despite shaving, this helped tremendously.

The location had plenty of parking, the staff were very nice, and the place was really clean. I’ve already recommended Arviv to a few friends.
review_date_label: Mar 30, 2026 (verified from SerpAPI iso_date, last edited Mar 30, 2026)

review_text: I went to see the doctor for a consult on a service I thought would help me with an issue I’m having. She was very upfront about the fact that she didn’t think it would resolve , or at least get much benefit to the area of concern but was willing to treat it and add other areas in the deal . I realized that it just wasn’t a good fit for what I was hoping for . I’m  thankful she was so transparent about expectations. She also was able to have the surgeon speak to me about another option I had not seriously considered snd that was awesome .  I did end up going ahead and having my microbladed brows lasered ( tattoo removal) because I want to treat them differently. I will absolutely return to this business for the many services they offer . It was a great professional environment.

review_text: Danielle at Arviv medical aesthetics in Tampa is truly a gem. From the moment the treatment begins, she creates such a warm, comforting environment that makes you feel completely care for. During my micro needling sessions she is always checking to make sure I am comfortable with the intensity and kindly gives me little breaks when I need them. What touches me the most is how attentive she is. She remembers my concerns, my progress, and even the personal stories that I share. It is clear that she genuinely cares about her patients and wants the best results for them. She even makes sure I know about the best deals available. I am so grateful to be in her care and highly recommend her.
